criteria_verification.criterion_text: Happy path: successful transcript fetch with correct result structure
criteria_verification.evidence: TestTranscriptClient.test_get_transcript_success verifies happy path: mocks api.fetch(), asserts video_id, language, language_code, is_auto_generated, total_segments, and full_text fields are correct.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Language fallback: auto-generated fallback when manual not found
criteria_verification.evidence: TestTranscriptClient.test_get_transcript_fallback_to_auto_generated tests auto-generated fallback. Additional tests: test_get_transcript_fallback_to_english (English variant fallback) and test_get_transcript_fallback_to_first_available (first available fallback).
criteria_verification.notes: TestTranscriptClient.test_get_transcript_fallback_to_auto_generated tests auto-generated fallback. Additional tests: test_get_transcript_fallback_to_english (English variant fallback) and test_get_transcript_fallback_to_first_available (first available fallback).

criteria_verification.evidence: Three dedicated tests: test_get_transcript_disabled_raises (TranscriptsDisabledError), test_get_transcript_video_unavailable_raises (VideoUnavailableError), test_get_transcript_no_transcripts_raises (NoTranscriptFoundError). Exception hierarchy verified in TestExceptionHierarchy class.
